meta.topic: Late postpartum preeclampsia with severe features

questions.topic: Late postpartum preeclampsia with severe features

title.en: Late postpartum preeclampsia with severe features presenting after discharge
title.zh: 出院后出现的迟发性产后子痫前期伴重度特征

summary.en: A 29-year-old primipara calls on postpartum day 4 with a severe headache, visual spots, new facial edema, and repeated home BP of 162/108 after an uncomplicated term vaginal birth and normotensive prenatal course.
summary.zh: 一名 29 岁初产妇在产后第 4 天来电，主诉严重头痛、眼前有斑点、新出现面部水肿，家庭血压反复为 162/108。她此前足月顺产且孕期血压正常。

content.en: G1P1, delivered a healthy 3,400-g infant vaginally at 39 weeks 2 days. Prenatal BP values were below 130/80, urine protein screens were negative, and there is no history of chronic hypertension, renal disease, autoimmune disease, or gestational hypertension. Discharged postpartum day 1 with BP 118/74, expected lochia rubra, firm fundus, no edema, and instructions to call for headache, vision changes, or BP above 140/90 on the home cuff. Breastfeeding. Medications: prenatal vitamins, ibuprofen 600 mg every 6 hours as needed, docusate sodium.
content.zh: G1P1，孕 39 周 2 天经阴道分娩一名健康 3,400 g 婴儿。孕期 BP 均低于 130/80，尿蛋白筛查阴性，无慢性高血压、肾病、自身免疫病或妊娠期高血压史。产后第 1 天出院，BP 118/74，恶露红色量符合预期，宫底坚硬，无水肿；被告知如出现头痛、视力改变或家庭血压超过 140/90 应来电。正在哺乳。用药：产前维生素、布洛芬 600 mg 每 6 小时按需、十二烷基磺基琥珀酸钠。

title.zh: 分娩住院基线实验室结果

content.en: Hemoglobin 11.8 g/dL; hematocrit 35%; platelets 238,000/µL; AST 22 U/L; ALT 18 U/L; creatinine 0.7 mg/dL; uric acid 4.1 mg/dL; LDH 162 U/L; urinalysis negative for protein.
content.zh: 血红蛋白 11.8 g/dL；血细胞比容 35%；血小板 238,000/µL；AST 22 U/L；ALT 18 U/L；肌酐 0.7 mg/dL；尿酸 4.1 mg/dL；LDH 162 U/L；尿检蛋白阴性。

title.en: Stage 1 - Triage call and ED arrival
title.zh: 第 1 阶段——分诊电话和到达急诊

content.en: At 10:15 AM, the patient reports severe frontal headache 8/10 unrelieved by ibuprofen, intermittent visual spots, new facial/periorbital puffiness, and home BP 162/108 twice, five minutes apart. She denies chest pain, shortness of breath, epigastric/RUQ pain, nausea, vomiting, seizure activity, focal weakness, and confusion. Lochia is light serosa and she is voiding without difficulty.
content.zh: 10:15 AM，患者报告严重额部头痛 8/10，布洛芬后未缓解；间歇性眼前有斑点；新出现面部/眼周浮肿；家庭 BP 两次均为 162/108，间隔 5 分钟。她否认胸痛、气短、上腹/右上腹痛、恶心、呕吐、癫痫发作、局灶无力和意识混乱。恶露为少量浆液性，排尿无困难。

content.en: Vitals: T 37.1 C, HR 96, BP 168/112, RR 18, SpO2 99% on room air. Repeat BP five minutes later: 164/110. Headache 9/10 with photophobia. Alert and oriented x4. Pupils equal and reactive; cranial nerves grossly intact; grip strength equal. DTRs 3+ at biceps and patella bilaterally with two beats of ankle clonus. Lungs clear; heart regular. Fundus firm just above symphysis pubis. Lower extremities 1+ pitting edema. Clean-catch urine dipstick: 3+ protein. 18-gauge IV placed and Foley inserted with 150 mL clear yellow urine initially. Stat CBC, CMP, LDH, uric acid, coagulation studies, and urine protein-to-creatinine ratio sent.
content.zh: 生命体征：T 37.1 C，HR 96，BP 168/112，RR 18，室内空气 SpO2 99%。5 分钟后复测 BP 164/110。头痛 9/10，畏光。清醒，定向力正常。瞳孔等大等圆且对光反应存在；颅神经大致完整；握力对称。双侧肱二头肌和髌腱反射 3+，踝阵挛 2 次。肺清，心律规则。宫底坚硬，位于耻骨联合上方。双下肢 1+ 凹陷性水肿。清洁中段尿试纸：蛋白 3+。已置入 18G IV，并插入 Foley，初始尿量 150 mL，清亮黄色。已送急查 CBC、CMP、LDH、尿酸、凝血检查和尿蛋白/肌酐比值。

title.zh: 第 2 阶段——启动急性治疗

content.en: Orders: magnesium sulfate 4 g IV loading dose over 20 minutes, then 2 g/hr continuous infusion for seizure prophylaxis; immediate-release nifedipine 10 mg PO now for acute BP reduction; repeat BP every 5 minutes for 20 minutes, then every 15 minutes; seizure precautions with padded side rails, suction at bedside, dimmed lighting, and minimized stimulation. Magnesium starts by pump at 11:40 AM; nifedipine 10 mg PO is given at 11:45 AM. BP after nifedipine: 158/104 at 11:50, 152/98 at 11:55, 148/96 at noon, 146/94 at 12:15. Urine output first hour: 60 mL. Headache improves to 6/10; occasional spots persist; DTRs remain 3+ with clonus.
content.zh: 医嘱：硫酸镁 4 g IV 负荷剂量 20 分钟内输注，随后 2 g/hr 连续输注用于癫痫预防；速释硝苯地平 10 mg PO 立即用于急性降压；前 20 分钟每 5 分钟复测 BP，之后每 15 分钟；癫痫预防措施包括床栏加垫、床旁备吸引、调暗灯光和减少刺激。11:40 AM 用输液泵开始硫酸镁；11:45 AM 给予硝苯地平 10 mg PO。硝苯地平后 BP：11:50 为 158/104，11:55 为 152/98，12:00 为 148/96，12:15 为 146/94。第一小时尿量 60 mL。头痛改善至 6/10；偶有视觉斑点；深腱反射仍为 3+ 并有阵挛。

content.en: Hemoglobin 12.0 g/dL; hematocrit 36%; platelets 195,000/µL; AST 34 U/L; ALT 28 U/L; creatinine 0.9 mg/dL; uric acid 6.8 mg/dL; LDH 198 U/L; INR 1.0; fibrinogen 380 mg/dL; urine protein-to-creatinine ratio 0.42.
content.zh: 血红蛋白 12.0 g/dL；血细胞比容 36%；血小板 195,000/µL；AST 34 U/L；ALT 28 U/L；肌酐 0.9 mg/dL；尿酸 6.8 mg/dL；LDH 198 U/L；INR 1.0；纤维蛋白原 380 mg/dL；尿蛋白/肌酐比值 0.42。

content.en: The patient asks whether she can continue breastfeeding while receiving nifedipine and magnesium. She can usually continue breastfeeding while receiving these medications, but lactation support may be needed because illness, hospitalization, and magnesium therapy can delay lactation or make feeding more difficult.
content.zh: 患者询问接受硝苯地平和硫酸镁时是否可以继续哺乳。通常可在接受这些药物时继续哺乳，但可能需要哺乳支持，因为疾病、住院和硫酸镁治疗可能延迟泌乳或增加喂养困难。

title.zh: 第 3 阶段——复评和稳定

content.en: At 1:00 PM BP is 142/90. At 1:30 PM BP is 138/88; headache is 4/10; visual spots have resolved; facial edema is unchanged; DTRs are 2+ with no clonus; RR 16/min; patient is alert. Urine output second hour is 45 mL. Magnesium continues at 2 g/hr. Later BP: 140/86 at 2:00 PM and 136/84 at 2:30 PM. Provider plan: continue magnesium for 24 hours from the loading dose, start nifedipine ER 30 mg every 12 hours for maintenance BP control, and repeat HELLP panel in 6 hours.
content.zh: 1:00 PM BP 142/90。1:30 PM BP 138/88；头痛 4/10；视觉斑点消失；面部水肿无变化；深腱反射 2+，无阵挛；RR 16 次/分；患者清醒。第二小时尿量 45 mL。硫酸镁继续以 2 g/hr 输注。随后 BP：2:00 PM 为 140/86，2:30 PM 为 136/84。医嘱计划：从负荷剂量开始继续硫酸镁 24 小时，开始硝苯地平 ER 30 mg 每 12 小时用于维持血压控制，并 6 小时后复查 HELLP 相关检查。

content.en: The patient asks when she can go home and whether this can happen again. Her mother feels guilty for telling her the symptoms were normal and asks what warning signs she should watch for after discharge.
content.zh: 患者询问什么时候可以回家，以及这种情况是否会再次发生。她的母亲因曾告诉她这些症状正常而感到内疚，并询问出院后应观察哪些警示征象。

questions.topic: Late postpartum preeclampsia with severe features

stem.en: During the postpartum triage call, highlight the findings that form the urgent preeclampsia-with-severe-features cluster requiring immediate emergency evaluation.
stem.zh: 在产后分诊电话中，请高亮显示构成子痫前期伴重度特征、需要立即急诊评估的紧急发现组合。

segments.en: Severe frontal headache rated 8/10 unrelieved by ibuprofen.
segments.zh: 严重额部头痛，8/10，服用布洛芬后未缓解。

segments.en: Intermittent scotomata described as seeing spots.
segments.zh: 间歇性暗点，描述为“看到斑点”。

segments.en: New facial and periorbital edema that is markedly different from yesterday.
segments.zh: 新出现的面部和眼周水肿，与前一天明显不同。

segments.en: Home BP is 162/108 on two readings five minutes apart.
segments.zh: 家庭血压两次测量均为 162/108，两次间隔 5 分钟。

segments.en: Lochia has transitioned to light serosa.
segments.zh: 恶露已转为少量浆液性恶露。

segments.en: Voiding without difficulty with estimated adequate urine output.
segments.zh: 排尿无困难，估计尿量充足。

segments.en: Denies chest pain and shortness of breath.
Reports poor sleep related to newborn care.
segments.zh: 因照顾新生儿而睡眠不足。

correct.en: The severe headache unrelieved by analgesic, visual scotomata, new facial/periorbital edema, and repeated BP of 162/108 on postpartum day 4 are an urgent severe-feature cluster. Expected lochia, adequate voiding, no chest pain, and poor sleep do not make the cluster less urgent.
correct.zh: 未被止痛药缓解的严重头痛、视觉暗点、新出现的面部/眼周水肿，以及产后第 4 天反复测得 BP 162/108，构成重度特征的紧急组合。恶露符合预期、排尿充足、无胸痛和睡眠不足，不能降低这一组合的紧急性。

byChoice.en: A severe headache that does not respond to ibuprofen is a central nervous system warning sign in this context.
byChoice.zh: 布洛芬不能缓解的严重头痛，在此情境下是中枢神经系统警示征象。

byChoice.en: Scotomata are visual symptoms that increase concern for severe preeclampsia and seizure risk.
byChoice.zh: 暗点属于视觉症状，会增加对子痫前期重症及癫痫发作风险的担忧。

byChoice.en: New facial and periorbital edema is concerning when paired with severe BP and CNS symptoms.
byChoice.zh: 当新出现的面部和眼周水肿与重度血压和中枢神经症状同时出现时，具有警示意义。

byChoice.en: A BP of 162/108 includes a systolic value in the severe range and requires emergent evaluation in this symptom cluster.
byChoice.zh: BP 162/108 的收缩压已达重度范围，在这一症状组合下需要紧急评估。

byChoice.en: Light serosa is an expected postpartum lochia transition and does not explain the neurologic and BP findings.
byChoice.zh: 少量浆液性恶露是产后预期变化，不能解释神经系统和血压异常。

byChoice.en: Adequate voiding is reassuring for output, but it does not remove the need for emergency evaluation of severe BP and CNS symptoms.
byChoice.zh: 排尿充足对尿量有一定安慰意义，但不能取消对重度血压和中枢神经症状进行急诊评估的需要。

byChoice.en: Absence of chest pain is not enough to downgrade urgency when severe BP and CNS symptoms are present.
byChoice.zh: 在已有重度血压和中枢神经症状时，没有胸痛不足以降低紧急程度。

byChoice.en: Sleep deprivation is common postpartum, but it should not be used to dismiss a severe headache with visual symptoms and severe BP.
byChoice.zh: 产后睡眠不足很常见，但不能用来解释或忽视伴视觉症状和重度血压的严重头痛。

testTakingStrategy.en: In postpartum questions, do not normalize a headache when it is severe, unrelieved, paired with visual changes, or paired with severe-range BP.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 遇到产后题目时，只要头痛严重、不能缓解、伴视觉改变或伴重度范围血压，就不要把它当作正常产后不适。

glossary.defZh: 视野中出现斑点、闪光或缺损，可提示子痫前期的神经系统受累。
通常指收缩压 ≥160 mm Hg 或舒张压 ≥110 mm Hg。
分娩后出现的高血压相关综合征，可伴头痛、视觉症状、蛋白尿或其他器官受累。

questions.topic: Late postpartum preeclampsia with severe features

stem.en: At ED arrival, classify each cue according to how it should affect the nurse's interpretation before lab results are available.
stem.zh: 患者到达急诊时，在实验室结果尚未返回前，请判断每项线索对护士解释病情的意义。

rows.en: BP 168/112, repeated as 164/110 five minutes later

rows.zh: 头痛 9/10，伴间歇性视觉斑点

rows.en: DTRs 3+ with two beats of ankle clonus
rows.zh: 深腱反射 3+，踝阵挛 2 次

rows.en: HELLP laboratory panel is still pending
rows.zh: HELLP 相关实验室检查仍未返回

columns.zh: 重度特征或需立即处理的线索

columns.en: Supportive but not required for immediate treatment
columns.zh: 有支持意义但不是立即处理的必要条件

correct.en: The repeated severe-range BP, CNS symptoms, and hyperreflexia with clonus are enough to classify the presentation as preeclampsia with severe features and begin urgent treatment. Proteinuria supports the diagnosis, but severe BP and CNS findings drive immediate action. Pending labs are drawn concurrently and should not delay treatment.
correct.zh: 反复重度范围 BP、中枢神经症状以及伴阵挛的反射亢进，足以将此表现判断为子痫前期伴重度特征并启动紧急治疗。蛋白尿支持诊断，但立即行动由重度 BP 和中枢神经发现驱动。实验室检查应同时进行，不能因此延误治疗。

byChoice.en: Both readings meet severe-range criteria because the systolic value is at least 160 and the diastolic value is at least 110.
byChoice.zh: 两次读数均符合重度范围，因为收缩压至少 160，舒张压至少 110。

byChoice.en: Severe headache and visual symptoms are CNS warning signs and raise concern for impending eclampsia.
byChoice.zh: 严重头痛和视觉症状是中枢神经系统警示征象，提示子痫风险升高。

byChoice.en: Hyperreflexia with clonus indicates CNS irritability and supports seizure-risk management.
byChoice.zh: 反射亢进伴阵挛提示中枢神经兴奋性增加，支持进行癫痫发作风险处理。

byChoice.en: Proteinuria supports preeclampsia, but severe-range BP with CNS symptoms already requires urgent action.
byChoice.zh: 蛋白尿支持子痫前期，但重度范围 BP 加中枢神经症状本身已需要紧急处理。

byChoice.en: Waiting for the HELLP panel would create an unsafe delay; labs are evaluated while treatment begins.
byChoice.zh: 等待 HELLP 检查结果会造成不安全延误；应在开始治疗的同时评估实验室结果。

testTakingStrategy.en: When a severe BP threshold and neurologic symptoms are present, act on the instability first; confirmatory labs should not become a prerequisite for safety treatment.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 当出现重度血压阈值和神经系统症状时，先处理不稳定状态；确认性实验室检查不应成为安全治疗的前提。

glossary.defZh: 快速牵拉肌腱后出现的重复性不自主收缩，提示神经肌肉兴奋性增加。
以溶血、肝酶升高和血小板减少为特征的妊娠相关严重并发症。
尿中蛋白异常增多，可支持子痫前期诊断。

questions.topic: Late postpartum preeclampsia with severe features

stem.en: Use the Stage 2 assessment and laboratory results to complete the diagnostic reasoning statement.
stem.zh: 根据第 2 阶段评估和实验室结果，完成诊断推理陈述。

clozeStem.en: The priority working diagnosis is {{dx}}. HELLP syndrome is less likely because {{hellp_evidence}}, and postpartum hypertension without severe features is less likely because {{severity_evidence}}.
clozeStem.zh: 优先工作诊断是 {{dx}}。HELLP 综合征可能性较低，因为 {{hellp_evidence}}；产后高血压不伴重度特征可能性较低，因为 {{severity_evidence}}。

options.zh: 产后子痫前期伴重度特征
产后高血压不伴重度特征

options.en: platelets, AST/ALT, and LDH are not showing the HELLP triad
options.zh: 血小板、AST/ALT 和 LDH 未显示 HELLP 三联征

options.en: severe-range BP is paired with headache, scotomata, hyperreflexia, and clonus
options.zh: 重度范围 BP 伴头痛、暗点、反射亢进和阵挛

options.en: the patient denies right upper quadrant pain

correct.en: Stage 2 supports postpartum preeclampsia with severe features: severe-range BP, CNS symptoms, hyperreflexia with clonus, and proteinuria are present. HELLP is not supported because platelets, transaminases, and LDH are not showing the defining pattern. Hypertension without severe features is excluded by the severe BP and neurologic findings.
correct.zh: 第 2 阶段支持产后子痫前期伴重度特征：存在重度范围 BP、中枢神经症状、反射亢进伴阵挛以及蛋白尿。血小板、转氨酶和 LDH 未显示 HELLP 的特征模式，因此不支持 HELLP。重度 BP 和神经系统发现排除了“不伴重度特征”的高血压分类。

byChoice.en: The diagnosis dropdown is keyed to postpartum preeclampsia with severe features because severe BP and CNS findings are present after delivery.
byChoice.zh: 诊断下拉项选择产后子痫前期伴重度特征，因为分娩后出现重度 BP 和中枢神经发现。

byChoice.en: HELLP requires the hemolysis/liver-enzyme/platelet pattern; this case instead has normal platelets, near-normal transaminases, and normal LDH.
byChoice.zh: HELLP 需要溶血、肝酶升高和血小板减少的模式；本病例血小板正常，转氨酶接近正常，LDH 正常。

byChoice.en: The severe-range BP plus neurologic symptoms and clonus makes the severe-feature classification, not a mild postpartum hypertension classification.
byChoice.zh: 重度范围 BP 加神经系统症状和阵挛，决定了重度特征分类，而不是轻度产后高血压分类。

testTakingStrategy.en: Use abnormal defining criteria, not tempting associated findings, to separate competing diagnoses.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 区分竞争诊断时，要抓定义性异常标准，而不是被诱人的相关发现带偏。

glossary.defZh: AST 和 ALT 等肝细胞损伤指标。
可在溶血或组织损伤时升高；HELLP 评估中常用。
根据当前资料最优先采用、指导下一步处理的诊断。

questions.topic: Late postpartum preeclampsia with severe features

stem.en: The patient asks, 'Will the magnesium bring my blood pressure down?' Which response by the nurse is best?
stem.zh: 患者问：“镁剂会把我的血压降下来吗？”护士哪项回答最佳？

options.en: Magnesium sulfate helps prevent seizures; the immediate-release nifedipine is the medication ordered to lower the blood pressure quickly.
options.zh: 硫酸镁用于帮助预防癫痫发作；医嘱中的速释硝苯地平才是用于快速降低血压的药物。

options.en: Magnesium sulfate is the main antihypertensive, so nifedipine can wait until the loading dose is complete.
options.zh: 硫酸镁是主要降压药，所以硝苯地平可以等负荷剂量结束后再给。

options.en: The extended-release nifedipine capsule would work just as well for this acute severe BP reading.
options.zh: 缓释硝苯地平胶囊对这次急性重度血压读数同样有效。

options.en: Because you are breastfeeding, both magnesium sulfate and nifedipine should be withheld until lactation consults.
options.zh: 因为你正在哺乳，应先停用硫酸镁和硝苯地平，等哺乳顾问评估后再说。

correct.en: Magnesium sulfate is used for seizure prophylaxis in preeclampsia with severe features; it is not the acute antihypertensive. Immediate-release nifedipine is ordered for rapid BP reduction, while extended-release nifedipine is for maintenance control later.
correct.zh: 硫酸镁用于子痫前期伴重度特征的癫痫发作预防；它不是急性降压药。速释硝苯地平的医嘱目的是快速降低 BP，而缓释硝苯地平用于后续维持控制。

byChoice.en: This accurately separates seizure prophylaxis from BP control and reinforces the immediate-release nifedipine order.
byChoice.zh: 这准确区分了癫痫预防和血压控制，并强调速释硝苯地平医嘱。

byChoice.en: This repeats the unsafe misconception that magnesium is an antihypertensive and would delay BP treatment.
byChoice.zh: 这重复了“硫酸镁是降压药”的不安全误解，会延误血压治疗。

byChoice.en: Extended-release nifedipine is not interchangeable with immediate-release nifedipine for acute severe BP reduction.
byChoice.zh: 在急性重度 BP 降压中，缓释硝苯地平不能替代速释硝苯地平。

byChoice.en: Breastfeeding does not justify withholding urgently indicated seizure prophylaxis and antihypertensive therapy; lactation support can occur alongside treatment.
byChoice.zh: 哺乳并不能成为停用紧急所需癫痫预防和降压治疗的理由；哺乳支持可以与治疗同时进行。

testTakingStrategy.en: Match each medication to its purpose before deciding whether it can be delayed or substituted.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 判断药物能否延迟或替代前，先把每种药物与其治疗目的对应起来。

glossary.defZh: 在子痫前期重症中用于预防或治疗癫痫发作的高警示药物。
药物释放较快，适用于需要较快起效的情境。
用于降低血压的药物。

questions.topic: Late postpartum preeclampsia with severe features

stem.en: At 11:40 AM, the nurse is initiating treatment for confirmed severe-range BP and seizure risk. Which actions should the nurse include now? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 11:40 AM，护士正在为已确认的重度范围 BP 和癫痫发作风险启动治疗。护士现在应包括哪些措施？选择所有适用项。

options.en: Start the magnesium sulfate loading dose by infusion pump as ordered.
options.zh: 按医嘱用输液泵开始硫酸镁负荷剂量。

options.en: Administer the immediate-release nifedipine 10 mg PO as ordered.
options.zh: 按医嘱给予速释硝苯地平 10 mg PO。

options.en: Implement seizure precautions, including padded side rails, suction at bedside, dim lighting, and minimized stimulation.
options.zh: 实施癫痫预防措施，包括床栏加垫、床旁备吸引、调暗灯光并减少刺激。

options.en: Monitor BP every 5 minutes for the first 20 minutes, then as ordered.
options.zh: 前 20 分钟每 5 分钟监测 BP，之后按医嘱监测。

options.en: Wait until the magnesium loading dose is complete before giving nifedipine.
options.zh: 等硫酸镁负荷剂量完成后再给予硝苯地平。

options.en: Run the magnesium by gravity tubing to save time if the pump is not immediately nearby.
options.zh: 如果输液泵不在旁边，为节省时间用重力输液管滴注硫酸镁。

correct.en: These are concurrent priorities: start magnesium safely by pump for seizure prophylaxis, give immediate-release nifedipine for acute BP reduction, create a low-stimulation seizure-safe environment, and perform close serial BP monitoring. The nurse should not force a sequence that delays either medication or safety precautions.
correct.zh: 这些是同时进行的优先措施：用输液泵安全启动硫酸镁以预防癫痫，给予速释硝苯地平进行急性降压，建立低刺激且防癫痫的环境，并密切连续监测 BP。护士不应人为设置顺序而延误任一药物或安全措施。

byChoice.en: Magnesium is a high-alert infusion and should be administered by pump at the ordered loading rate.
byChoice.zh: 硫酸镁是高警示输注药物，应按医嘱负荷速率用输液泵给药。

byChoice.en: The antihypertensive should be given promptly; it should not wait for completion of the magnesium loading dose.
byChoice.zh: 降压药应及时给予；不应等硫酸镁负荷剂量结束后再给。

byChoice.en: Seizure precautions reduce injury risk during the period of high CNS irritability.
byChoice.zh: 在中枢神经兴奋性高的时期，癫痫预防措施可降低受伤风险。

byChoice.en: Frequent BP monitoring evaluates response and detects persistent severe hypertension or hypotension after treatment.
byChoice.zh: 频繁 BP 监测可评估疗效，并发现治疗后持续重度高血压或低血压。

byChoice.en: Waiting for the magnesium load to finish would delay acute BP treatment during the highest-risk window.
byChoice.zh: 等待硫酸镁负荷完成会在最高风险窗口延误急性降压治疗。

byChoice.en: Gravity tubing is unsafe for a high-alert magnesium infusion because accurate rate control is essential.
byChoice.zh: 硫酸镁为高警示输注药物，必须精确控制速率，用重力滴注不安全。

testTakingStrategy.en: When interventions protect against different immediate risks, decide whether they are concurrent rather than forcing an ordered-response mindset.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 当多项干预分别针对不同的即时风险时，要判断它们是否应并行，而不是强行套用排序思维。

glossary.defZh: 降低癫痫发作时受伤和误吸风险的环境与设备准备。
用于精确控制静脉输液速率的设备。
按短间隔重复测量血压以评估趋势和治疗反应。

questions.topic: Late postpartum preeclampsia with severe features

stem.en: At 1:30 PM, classify each reassessment finding as evidence of improvement/absence of toxicity, a finding requiring continued vigilance, or a finding that is not an acute treatment-response marker.
stem.zh: 1:30 PM，请将每项复评发现归类为改善/无中毒证据、需要继续警惕的发现，或不是急性治疗反应指标的发现。

rows.en: Visual spots have resolved and headache is now 4/10
rows.zh: 视觉斑点已消失，头痛现为 4/10

rows.en: Respiratory rate is 16/min and the patient is alert
rows.zh: 呼吸频率 16 次/分，患者清醒

rows.en: Urine output is 45 mL in the second hour

correct.en: BP below the severe range, improved headache/visual symptoms, normalized reflexes without clonus, and stable respirations/mentation indicate treatment response and no current magnesium toxicity. Urine output of 45 mL/hr is above the usual minimum for magnesium clearance but still requires close hourly monitoring. Facial edema often resolves over days and is not the acute marker of response.
correct.zh: BP 低于重度范围、头痛/视觉症状改善、反射恢复且无阵挛、呼吸和意识稳定，提示治疗有效且目前无镁中毒。45 mL/小时的尿量高于通常用于镁清除的最低值，但仍需每小时密切监测。面部水肿常需数天缓解，不是急性治疗反应指标。

byChoice.en: The immediate BP goal is to move out of the severe range while avoiding hypotension.
byChoice.zh: 即时 BP 目标是脱离重度范围，同时避免低血压。

byChoice.en: Resolution of visual symptoms and a lower headache score suggest decreasing CNS irritability.
byChoice.zh: 视觉症状消失且头痛评分降低，提示中枢神经兴奋性下降。

byChoice.en: DTRs that remain present and clonus that resolves support improvement and do not suggest magnesium toxicity.
byChoice.zh: 深腱反射仍存在且阵挛消失，支持病情改善，并不提示镁中毒。

byChoice.en: Stable respirations and alert mentation are key safety checks during magnesium therapy.
byChoice.zh: 呼吸稳定和意识清醒是硫酸镁治疗期间的关键安全检查。

byChoice.en: Urine output is adequate for now but must be trended because magnesium is renally cleared and oliguria increases toxicity risk.
byChoice.zh: 目前尿量尚可，但必须持续观察趋势，因为镁经肾脏清除，少尿会增加中毒风险。

byChoice.en: Persistent facial edema does not mean treatment failure in the first hours; it is not the acute response marker.
byChoice.zh: 最初数小时面部水肿持续存在并不代表治疗失败；它不是急性反应指标。

testTakingStrategy.en: Evaluate outcomes using the parameter tied to the immediate goal: BP and neurologic signs for preeclampsia response, respirations/reflexes/urine output for magnesium safety.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 评价结果时，要使用与即时目标相关的指标：用 BP 和神经系统体征判断子痫前期反应，用呼吸、反射和尿量判断硫酸镁安全性。

glossary.defZh: 硫酸镁水平过高导致反射消失、呼吸抑制、意识改变等危险表现。
反映肾灌注和药物清除能力的重要监测指标。
干预后病情朝预期方向改善的证据。

correct.en: This case requires recognizing late postpartum preeclampsia with severe features despite a normotensive pregnancy and recent discharge. The urgent cues are severe headache unrelieved by analgesic, scotomata, new facial edema, repeated severe-range BP, and later hyperreflexia with clonus. Management is not delayed for labs: magnesium sulfate is used for seizure prophylaxis, immediate-release nifedipine is used for acute BP reduction, seizure precautions and close BP monitoring occur concurrently, and response is evaluated by BP trend, CNS symptom improvement, reflex/clonus status, respirations/mentation, and urine output rather than rapid resolution of edema.
correct.zh: 本病例要求即使患者孕期血压正常且刚出院，也要识别迟发性产后子痫前期伴重度特征。紧急线索包括止痛药不能缓解的严重头痛、暗点、新出现面部水肿、反复重度范围 BP，以及随后出现的反射亢进伴阵挛。处理不能等待实验室结果：硫酸镁用于癫痫预防，速释硝苯地平用于急性降压，癫痫预防措施和密切 BP 监测应并行进行；疗效评估看 BP 趋势、中枢神经症状改善、反射/阵挛状态、呼吸/意识和尿量，而不是期待水肿快速消退。

testTakingStrategy.en: For postpartum emergencies, compare reported symptoms against severe-feature clusters, then match each intervention to the risk it prevents: seizure, stroke, injury, or medication toxicity.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 处理产后急症题时，先把报告的症状与重度特征组合比较，再把每项干预对应到它预防的风险：癫痫发作、中风、受伤或药物中毒。

glossary.defZh: 产后 48 小时后至数周内出现的子痫前期表现。
提示器官受累或严重风险的表现，如重度范围血压、严重头痛、视觉症状或神经系统兴奋性增加。
钙通道阻滞剂，可用于妊娠或产后高血压的血压控制；急性处理需按医嘱使用速释剂型。
用于评估溶血、肝酶升高和血小板减少的实验室检查组合。

questions.topic: Late postpartum preeclampsia with severe features

stem.en: Postpartum day 4: A previously normotensive primipara presents after discharge with BP 168/112 and 164/110, severe headache, scotomata, new facial edema, DTRs 3+ with ankle clonus, and urine protein-to-creatinine ratio 0.42. Labs show platelets 195,000/µL, AST 34 U/L, ALT 28 U/L, LDH 198 U/L, and creatinine 0.9 mg/dL. Select the most likely condition, two priority actions, and two parameters to monitor.
stem.zh: 产后第 4 天：一名此前血压正常的初产妇出院后来院，BP 168/112 和 164/110，严重头痛、暗点、新发面部水肿，深腱反射 3+ 并有踝阵挛，尿蛋白/肌酐比值 0.42。实验室结果：血小板 195,000/µL，AST 34 U/L，ALT 28 U/L，LDH 198 U/L，肌酐 0.9 mg/dL。请选择最可能的病情、两项优先措施和两项需监测的参数。

tokens.zh: 产后子痫前期伴重度特征
产后高血压不伴重度特征

tokens.en: Administer magnesium sulfate 4 g IV loading dose by pump as ordered
tokens.zh: 按医嘱用输液泵给予硫酸镁 4 g IV 负荷剂量

tokens.en: Administer immediate-release nifedipine 10 mg PO as ordered
tokens.zh: 按医嘱给予速释硝苯地平 10 mg PO

tokens.en: Withhold nifedipine because magnesium is already infusing
tokens.zh: 因硫酸镁已经在输注而暂缓硝苯地平

tokens.en: Substitute extended-release nifedipine for the acute dose
tokens.zh: 用缓释硝苯地平替代急性处理剂量

tokens.en: BP trend after acute antihypertensive therapy
tokens.zh: 急性降压治疗后的 BP 趋势

tokens.en: Magnesium safety and seizure-risk markers: RR, LOC, DTR/clonus, urine output, headache/visual symptoms
tokens.zh: 硫酸镁安全和癫痫风险指标：RR、LOC、DTR/阵挛、尿量、头痛/视觉症状

tokens.en: Facial edema as the marker of acute treatment response
tokens.zh: 把面部水肿作为急性治疗反应指标

tokens.en: Lochia color and amount as the main marker of preeclampsia response
tokens.zh: 把恶露颜色和量作为子痫前期反应的主要指标

correct.en: The condition is postpartum preeclampsia with severe features because severe-range BP is paired with CNS symptoms, clonus, edema, and proteinuria after delivery. The two immediate actions address different life-threatening risks: magnesium sulfate for seizure prophylaxis and immediate-release nifedipine for acute BP reduction. Monitoring must track BP response and magnesium/seizure safety markers.
correct.zh: 该病情为产后子痫前期伴重度特征，因为分娩后重度范围 BP 同时伴中枢神经症状、阵挛、水肿和蛋白尿。两项即时措施分别处理不同的危及生命风险：硫酸镁用于癫痫预防，速释硝苯地平用于急性降压。监测必须追踪 BP 反应以及硫酸镁/癫痫安全指标。

byChoice.en: This is keyed because the postpartum patient has repeated severe-range BP plus neurologic symptoms and clonus.
byChoice.zh: 这是正确项，因为该产后患者有反复重度范围 BP，并伴神经系统症状和阵挛。

byChoice.en: HELLP is a distractor; platelets, transaminases, and LDH do not show the defining HELLP pattern.
byChoice.zh: HELLP 是干扰项；血小板、转氨酶和 LDH 未显示 HELLP 的定义性模式。

byChoice.en: Hypertension without severe features is excluded by the severe BP readings and CNS findings.
byChoice.zh: 重度 BP 读数和中枢神经发现排除了不伴重度特征的高血压。

byChoice.en: Magnesium sulfate is prioritized for seizure prophylaxis in severe-feature disease.
byChoice.zh: 在伴重度特征的疾病中，硫酸镁是癫痫预防的优先措施。

byChoice.en: Immediate-release nifedipine is ordered for rapid BP reduction out of the severe range.
byChoice.zh: 速释硝苯地平的医嘱目的是将 BP 快速降出重度范围。

byChoice.en: Holding nifedipine because magnesium is running is unsafe because magnesium is not the antihypertensive.
byChoice.zh: 因为正在输注硫酸镁而暂缓硝苯地平是不安全的，因为硫酸镁不是降压药。

byChoice.en: Extended-release nifedipine is for maintenance control, not the acute severe BP dose ordered here.
byChoice.zh: 缓释硝苯地平用于维持控制，不适合作为此处急性重度 BP 的给药。

byChoice.en: BP trend confirms whether acute antihypertensive therapy is moving the patient below the severe range without hypotension.
byChoice.zh: BP 趋势可确认急性降压治疗是否使患者脱离重度范围且未发生低血压。

byChoice.en: Respirations, LOC, reflexes/clonus, urine output, and persistent CNS symptoms are key to magnesium safety and seizure-risk assessment.
byChoice.zh: 呼吸、LOC、反射/阵挛、尿量和持续中枢神经症状，是评估硫酸镁安全和癫痫风险的关键。

byChoice.en: Facial edema may persist for days and should not be used as the acute response marker.
byChoice.zh: 面部水肿可能持续数天，不应作为急性反应指标。

byChoice.en: Lochia is relevant to routine postpartum assessment, but it does not measure resolution of the hypertensive/seizure-risk emergency.
byChoice.zh: 恶露与常规产后评估有关，但不能衡量高血压/癫痫风险急症是否缓解。

testTakingStrategy.en: In a bowtie item, first anchor the condition with defining cues, then choose actions that treat different immediate threats, and monitor parameters tied to those threats.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 做 bowtie 题时，先用定义性线索锁定病情，再选择分别处理不同即时威胁的措施，并监测与这些威胁直接相关的参数。

glossary.defZh: 要求选择最可能病情、优先措施和监测参数的 NGN 临床判断题型。
在高风险状态下用药物或措施降低癫痫发作风险。
急性危机控制后用于维持稳定的后续治疗。
